Bash(__NEW_LINE_5689178df299388d__ python -c "
import json

# Load current collection config
d = json.load\(open\(''C:/Users/User/AppData/Local/Temp/model_diary_col.json''\)\)

# Update activity_type field values
for f in d[''fields'']:
    if f[''name''] == ''activity_type'':
        f[''values''] = [''fertilize'', ''pesticide'', ''irrigate'', ''prune'', ''weed'', ''harvest'', ''transport'', ''drying'', ''milling'', ''tree_care'', ''other'']
        print\(''Updated activity_type values:'', f[''values'']\)

# Build PATCH payload with all fields
payload = {''fields'': d[''fields'']}
json.dump\(payload, open\(''C:/Users/User/AppData/Local/Temp/model_diary_patch.json'', ''w''\)\)
print\(''Patch payload written''\)
")

$tinosB = [Convert]::ToBase64String\([System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("Tinos-Bold.ttf"\)\)

PS1)
